subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: Lo! On a certain day, this Haji Muhammad seized the collar of a Christian priest that he might convert him to the Faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این حاجی محمد یک روز گریبان کشیش مسیحی را گرفته بود که اورا تبلیغ نماید
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @the cross and the trinity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @stories; anecdotes
